title: The 47-Point Service Firm Ops Audit
subtitle: A focused 30-minute self-audit for 11–50 employee service firms. Find the 3 automations that free up the most hours this quarter.

sections.title: Client Intake & Kickoff
sections.description: Where the first 4 hours of every new client disappear.

items.text: Intake form auto-creates a client record in your CRM (zero manual retyping)
items.tip: If a human retypes the form into your CRM, that's 10-15 min/client.

items.text: Welcome email sends automatically within 60 seconds of form submit
items.tip: Delay past 5 minutes cuts response rate by ~40%.

items.text: Kickoff call scheduled without manual calendar ping-pong
items.tip: Use Cal.com or SavvyCal native round-robin.

items.text: Engagement letter auto-populates from CRM fields and sends via e-sign

sections.title: Project Delivery Ops
sections.description: Where margin leaks between kickoff and invoice.

items.text: Project kickoff doc is generated from intake data (not written from scratch)
Status updates to client are automated weekly from PM tool data
Time tracking auto-syncs from PM tool to billing system
QA checklist runs before every deliverable handoff

sections.title: Back-Office Admin
sections.description: Invoicing, renewals, compliance — the silent time-eaters.

items.text: Invoices generate automatically from completed project milestones
Renewal reminders fire 45 / 30 / 7 days before contract end
Expense receipts auto-match to client projects
Monthly financial summary compiled from accounting software without manual copy-paste

completion_cta.headline: Want me to score your ops?
completion_cta.description: Send me which items you couldn't check and I'll reply with the 3 automations I'd prioritize for your firm's size and stack — no sales call required.
